body:
## Rationale

Closes the Behemoth arc to the present day. Current Behemoth coverage in DB: Satanica, Thelema.6, Zos Kia Cultus (all shipped), Demigod, Evangelion, The Satanist (all confirmed in albumArticles.js). I Loved You at Your Darkest (#2510 promoted). The Apostasy is separate. Opvs Contra Natvram (2022) is the MOST RECENT Behemoth album and is NOT in DB, NOT in any open proposal.

Inferno signals: 6 GA4 views this run + 12 impr GSC pos 7.4. Behemoth = largest black/death cluster in DB by article count. LLM hook: 'What is Behemoth's latest album?' and 'What gear does Inferno use on Opvs Contra Natvram?' -- zero competitor coverage.

Gap verified: 'opvs-contra-natvram-drum-setup' absent from albumArticles.js grep (153 slugs checked 2026-06-26).

## Page to Create

Slug: opvs-contra-natvram-drum-setup
Album: Opvs Contra Natvram (2022, Nuclear Blast)
Drummer: Inferno (Zbigniew Prominski)
Notable tracks: Ov Fire and the Void callback era, Post Christum, Neo-Spartacvs
Gear era: Pearl Masters MCX custom black + Paiste 2002 Black series + Pork Pie snare -- distinct from earlier Paiste RUDE era

### Files to touch
- packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js -- add 1 entry
- public/llms/articles/opvs-contra-natvram-drum-setup.md (new)

Sitemap: auto-derived from ALBUM_ARTICLES.

## Quality Gate
- >= 300 words
- FAQ >= 3 Q&A (What drums does Inferno use on OCN? How does gear differ from The Satanist era? What is the OCN tuning approach?)
- Internal links >= 3 (-> inferno profile, -> the-satanist-drum-setup, -> i-loved-you-at-your-darkest via #2510)
- Person schema + MusicAlbum schema
- relatedAlbums: ['the-satanist-drum-setup', 'evangelion-drum-setup']

## Estimated Uplift
Closes Behemoth arc to 2022 -- direct LLM citation target ('What is Behemoth's newest album?'). Inferno = 12 GSC impr + 6 GA4 views. Zero competitor covers OCN gear specifically.

## Verify
- [ ] opvs-contra-natvram-drum-setup absent from albumArticles.js before merge
- [ ] Gear era (2022 Pearl/Paiste Black) distinct from prior Behemoth articles
- [ ] relatedAlbums: the-satanist + evangelion + i-loved-you-at-your-darkest
- [ ] LLM .md file at public/llms/articles/opvs-contra-natvram-drum-setup.md
- [ ] Page renders at /album/opvs-contra-natvram-drum-setup

## Done
One article live -- Behemoth arc complete from 1999 Satanica through 2022 OCN.
title: SEO: Behemoth 'Opvs Contra Natvram' drum setup article (Inferno, 2022 -- closes Behemoth arc to present)
